channel.title: Zero483 FDA Pharma Alerts
channel.description: Live tracker for FDA drug recalls, warning letters, and guidance.

item.title: Drug Approval: ZAYNICH - WOCKHARDT BIO AG
item.description: Application: NDA220787 Sponsor: WOCKHARDT BIO AG Product: ZAYNICH Submission type: ORIG Submission class: Type 1 - New Molecular Entity and Type 4 - New Combination Status: AP Status date: 20260529

item.title: Drug Recall: cimzia (certolizumab pegol), 2x200mg/mL PREFILLED SYRINGES (2 single-dose), Rx O
item.description: Recalling firm: UCB Biosciences Inc. Product: cimzia (certolizumab pegol), 2x200mg/mL PREFILLED SYRINGES (2 single-dose), Rx ONLY, Manufactured by: UCB Inc., Smyrna, GA 30080, a) NDC 50474-710-79, b) Professional sample, NDC 50474-710-80; c) 3 cartons, STARTER KIT, NDC 50474-710-81. Reason: Lack of Assurance of Sterility Classification: Class II Status: Ongoing Distribution: US Nationwide. Quantity: 141,708 cartons

item.title: Drug Recall: MG217 Multi-Symptom Treatment Cream & Skin Protectant (colloidal oatmeal 2%), NE
item.description: Recalling firm: Wisconsin Pharmacal Company Product: MG217 Multi-Symptom Treatment Cream & Skin Protectant (colloidal oatmeal 2%), NET WT 6 oz (170 g), Manufactured by: Pharmacal 1 Pharmacal Way, P.O. Box 198, Jackson, WI 53037. Reason: Microbial Contamination of Non-Sterile Products: confirmed presence of Staphylococcus Aureus. Classification: Class I Status: Ongoing Distribution: USA Nationwide and Bahamas Quantity: 690 tubes

item.title: Drug Recall: Primidone Tablets, USP, 50 mg, 100 Tablets (10 x 10 unit dose blister) per carto
item.description: Recalling firm: Amerisource Health Services LLC Product: Primidone Tablets, USP, 50 mg, 100 Tablets (10 x 10 unit dose blister) per carton, Rx only, Distributed by: American Health Packaging, Columbus, Ohio 43217. Carton NDC: 68084-202-01; Individual Dose NDC: 68084-202-11 Reason: Cross contamination with other products: API contaminated with trace amounts of Acemetacin API. Classification: Class III Status: Ongoing Distribution: USA Nationwide Quantity: 225,000 tablets

item.title: Drug Recall: Liraglutide Injection, 18 mg/3 mL (6 mg/mL), Rx only, Manufactured for: Lupin Ph
item.description: Recalling firm: Lupin Pharmaceuticals Inc. Product: Liraglutide Injection, 18 mg/3 mL (6 mg/mL), Rx only, Manufactured for: Lupin Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Naples, FL 34108, Manufactured by: Lupin Limited, Nagpur 441108, INDIA, a) 2 Pens- NDC 70748-346-02; b) 3 Pens - NDC 70748-346-03. Reason: Presence of particulate matter: a white thread-like structure in the cartridge Classification: Class II Status: Ongoing Distribution: Nationwide within U.S Quantity: 217,621 pen injectors

item.title: Drug Recall: Erythromycin Tablets, USP, 500 mg, 30 tablets per bottle, Rx only, Manufactured
item.description: Recalling firm: Zydus Pharmaceuticals (USA) Inc Product: Erythromycin Tablets, USP, 500 mg, 30 tablets per bottle, Rx only, Manufactured by: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd., Ahmedabad, India, Distributed by: Zydus Pharmaceuticals (USA) Inc., Pennington, NJ 08534; (NDC 70710-1048-3). Reason: CGMP Deviations; presence of N-Nitroso-Desmethyl-Erythromycin above the recommended acceptable intake limit Classification: Class II Status: Ongoing Distribution: Nationwide within the U.S Quantity: 10,992 bottles

item.title: Drug Recall: fentaNYL Citrate, Sterile CADD for Injection, 2,2500 mcg/50mL in Sterile Water,
item.description: Recalling firm: IntegraDose Compounding Services LLC Product: fentaNYL Citrate, Sterile CADD for Injection, 2,2500 mcg/50mL in Sterile Water, IntegraDose Compounding Services LLC, 3650 Victorie St N, Suite 900, Shoreview, MN, NDC 71139-6030-1. Reason: Subpotent Drug Classification: Class II Status: Ongoing Distribution: Nationwide. Quantity: 376 cassettes

item.title: Drug Recall: Atomoxetine Capsules HCL, 10 mg Capsules in unit dose foil strip, strips are pac
item.description: Recalling firm: Safecor Health, LLC Product: Atomoxetine Capsules HCL, 10 mg Capsules in unit dose foil strip, strips are packed in cartons of 100, Rx Only, Pkg by: Safecor, Columbus, OH 43204. NDC: 64380-474-01 Reason: Labeling: Label Mix-Up: Atomoxetine HCl 25mg Capsule incorrectly labeled as Atomoxetine HCl 10mg Capsule. Classification: Class II Status: Ongoing Distribution: TX only Quantity: 149 capsules
